mapper.insert: INSERT INTO change_record(order_id, old_flight_id, new_flight_id, old_seat_id, new_seat_id, price_diff, change_fee, status) VALUES(#{orderId}, #{oldFlightId}, #{newFlightId}, #{oldSeatId}, #{newSeatId}, #{priceDiff}, #{changeFee}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, order_id, old_flight_id, new_flight_id, old_seat_id, new_seat_id, price_diff, change_fee, status, created_at FROM change_record WHERE order_id = #{orderId} ORDER BY id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM change_record WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
